## TDD checklist
- [ ] Tests were written before implementation (red)
- [ ] Implementation makes tests pass (green)
- [ ] Code was refactored after green, tests still pass
- [ ] Commit history shows the red/green/refactor steps (not one giant commit)

## Checklist
- [ ] `mvn test` passes locally
- [ ] No new compiler warnings introduced
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] CI is green (Build, Tests, Package, Summary, Smoke Test)
